title: Chimichurri-Grilled Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A light and refreshing Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring tender beef skewers, smothered in a zesty chimichurri sauce. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, parsley, oregano, garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and brush with chimichurri sauce. Serve immediately.
To make chimichurri sauce, combine parsley, oregano, garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper in a bowl. Stir in olive oil and lemon juice.
